misc.text: #ONEPIECE1183 Something that we've all been overlooking. Brook said back in Thriller Bark arc that Thriller Bark is an island originating from his homeland. The castle of Esperia kingdom is the same castle as we see in Thriller Bark!

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1183 My brother just came up with the idea that Thriller Bark could be the remnants of the Esperia Kingdom. We are actually discussing it right now, and he's putting some ideas together about
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1183 My brother just came up with the idea that Thriller Bark could be the remnants of the Esperia Kingdom. We are actually discussing it right now, and he's putting some ideas together about it. What do you guys think? What are the chances of this being true?

misc.title: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but th
misc.text: In Japanese SBS, Sanji is said to smell like “tobacco and the blessings of the sea,” but in English it becomes “tobacco and seafood.” A little nuance is lost. Oda doesn’t mean ordinary seafood, but the ocean’s blessings, like gifts from a divine mother. 🌟🐠
